message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="scott-wlaschin" color="yellow" summary="Step 9 design feedback already sent, no blockers">
Scott Wlaschin: I sent my Step 9 design feedback already (7 points, no blocking items, design approved). Please check your earlier messages. To be explicit: my design feedback is in and I have no blockers. You can count me as ready for implementation to begin.
</teammate-message>

content.text: All 8 reviewers have responded and confirmed no blockers. Still waiting for the team lead to confirm 9/9 consensus (including my own approval as Driver) so I can proceed with the commit.
